pkgmetadata.longdescription: Google APIs common protos[[pypi](httpsimg.shields.iopypivgoogleapis-common-protos.svg)](httpspypi.orgprojectgoogleapis-common-protos)googleapis-common-protos contains the python classes generated from the commonprotos in the [googleapisapi-common-protos](httpsgithub.comgoogleapisapi-common-protos) repository.
